HOME.SUBTITLE: Book your appointment quickly and easily

BOOKING.TITLE: Book Appointment
BOOKING.SUCCESS: We sent you a confirmation link to {{email}}. Please click the link within 15 minutes to secure your appointment.
BOOKING.ERROR_NAME_PHONE: Enter your name and phone number
BOOKING.ERROR_PHONE: Enter a valid phone number (min. 9 digits)
BOOKING.ERROR_NO_INTERNET: No internet connection. Check your network and try again.
BOOKING.ERROR_GENERIC: An error occurred. Please try again.
BOOKING.AUTO_ADVANCE: All slots are taken, you have been moved to the next available date.
BOOKING.ALL_TAKEN: All slots in the coming days are taken. Please try again later.

FORM.NAME: Name
FORM.NAME_MIN: Name must be at least 2 characters
FORM.PHONE_MIN: Phone must be at least 9 digits

CONFIRM.SUCCESS: Your appointment has been confirmed! See you soon. ✂️
CONFIRM.EXPIRED: This confirmation link has expired. Please book again.
CONFIRM.SLOT_TAKEN: This slot was taken by someone else. Please book again.

CANCEL.SUCCESS: Your appointment has been successfully cancelled.
CANCEL.ERROR: Unable to cancel. The link may be invalid or already used.

ADMIN.DAY_OFF_BANNER: ⚠️ THIS DAY IS MARKED AS CLOSED

ABOUT.TITLE: About Us
ABOUT.SUBTITLE: More than a haircut — a place where style has character.
ABOUT.STORY_TEXT: Hairstyle Vidaković is a place where tradition meets modern style. We have been building trust through quality, precision and good conversation for years.

SERVICES_PAGE.TITLE: Our Services
SERVICES_PAGE.SUBTITLE: Professional care, modern style and attention to detail.
SERVICES_PAGE.HAIRCUT_DESC: Precise haircut tailored to your style and face shape.
SERVICES_PAGE.SHAVE_DESC: Classic or modern shave with maximum comfort.
SERVICES_PAGE.STYLING_DESC: Finishing touches and hairstyle shaping to your liking.
SERVICES_PAGE.TRIM_DESC: Beard and contour grooming for a clean and tidy look.

OFFLINE: No internet connection — changes will not be saved
